title: VertexVirtual
description: (Back-again)Vertex Virtual - Free Minecraft PvP Texture Pack for 1.21+ | Crystal PvP (CPvP), Sword PvP, FPS Boost, Small Totems, Short Swords, Clean Textures, Better Visibility, and Competitive Combat Optimization.
body:
### 
### VertexVirtual is a lightweight resource pack tailored for competitive Minecraft players focusing on Crystal PvP (CPvP) and sword PvP. It delivers essential visual refinements to enhance performance and clarity during intense combat without unnecessary changes.

> _Best **Modpack** to use this it_ = [**Crystalium Modpack** ](https://modrinth.com/project/QJ8IVywt)By Me-CarbonO2 ...

# Built for PvP. Optimized for Victory.

**Main Features:**  
- Reduced totem of undying activation size for minimal screen obstruction while preserving clear feedback.  
- Compact sword models and held item scales to improve target visibility and reduce visual clutter.  
- Smooth, optimized textures across key elements to provide a noticeable FPS increase, especially in high-action scenarios or on lower-spec systems.  

The pack maintains a clean, near-vanilla appearance with targeted PvP improvements only. 
Tested in 1.21 , **1.21.1** , **1.21.4** and **1.21.8** Version.

Download and experience improved responsiveness in your PvP sessions.
